categories.name: Campus Dining
categories.description: Fresh meals and drinks crafted for busy academic days.

categories.name: Study Essentials
categories.description: Notebooks, planners, and tools for productive classes.

categories.name: University Merchandise
categories.description: Official apparel and branded lifestyle products.

categories.name: Tech & Gadgets
categories.description: Devices and accessories for learning, collaboration, and focus.

products.name: Signature Nasi Goreng
products.tagline: Smoky wok-fried rice with campus favorite spices.
products.description: A hearty plate of signature nasi goreng topped with ayam suwir, telur mata sapi, acar segar, and crunchy crackers. Built to keep you energized from the first lecture to the final assignment.

products.name: Sate Ayam Madura
products.tagline: Tender grilled skewers with rich peanut sauce.
products.description: Chicken satay marinated overnight and grilled to order. Served with creamy peanut sauce, lontong, and a bright sambal finish for a balanced, satisfying plate.

products.name: Signature Matcha Latte
products.tagline: Creamy ceremonial-style matcha with balanced sweetness.
products.description: A smooth iced matcha latte with gentle earthy notes, creamy milk texture, and customizable sweetness. Great as a study session companion or post-class refreshment.

products.name: Campus Study Bundle
products.tagline: Notebook, planner, sticky tabs, and pen set in one kit.
products.description: A curated starter pack for students who want a cleaner semester workflow. Includes a weekly planner, premium notebook, color tabs, and smooth-writing pens in a branded pouch.

products.name: Masoem Varsity Hoodie
products.tagline: Heavyweight campus hoodie with refined embroidery.
products.description: Premium fleece varsity hoodie designed for comfort in lecture halls, libraries, and travel. Finished with embroidered branding and a relaxed unisex fit.

products.name: Wireless Focus Headset
products.tagline: Reliable wireless audio for class, calls, and deep work.
products.description: Comfortable over-ear headset with long battery life, low-latency pairing, and a clean microphone profile suitable for online learning and collaborative meetings.

products.name: Executive Journal Set
products.tagline: Minimal desk companion for notes, plans, and reflections.
products.description: A premium ruled journal paired with a sturdy pen and divider cards. Ideal for students, lecturers, and campus organizations managing polished notes.

products.name: Scholar Salmon Bowl
products.tagline: Protein-packed bowl for long productive afternoons.
products.description: Grilled salmon served over quinoa, sweet potato, and fresh greens with tahini dressing. A balanced, premium option for health-focused campus dining.
